heading: Ocean and coastal resiliency
label: 2803a Ocean and coastal resiliency
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Water Resources Reform and Development Act of 2014, and not as part of title V of , popularly known as the National Coastal Monitoring Act, which comprises this chapter.Pub. L. 92–532

“Secretary” DefinedSecretary means the Secretary of the Army, see , set out as a note under .section 2 of Pub. L. 113–121section 2201 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct studies to determine the feasibility of carrying out Corps of Engineers projects in coastal zones to enhance ocean and coastal ecosystem resiliency.

as appropriate, coordinate with the heads of other appropriate Federal agencies, the Governors and other chief executive officers of the coastal states, nonprofit organizations, Indian tribes, and other interested parties;
identify Corps of Engineers projects in coastal zones for enhancing ocean and coastal ecosystem resiliency based on an assessment of the need and opportunities for, and feasibility of, the projects;

give priority to projects in communities the existence of which is threatened by rising sea level, including projects relating to shoreline restoration, tidal marsh restoration, dunal habitats to protect coastal infrastructure, reduction of future and existing emergency repair costs, and the beneficial reuse of dredged materials;
to the maximum extent practicable, use any existing Corps of Engineers plans and data; and
not later than 365 days after initial appropriations for this section, and every five years thereafter subject to the availability of appropriations, complete a study authorized under subsection (a).

children.heading: Report
children.label: 2 Report
children.text: For each project that does not meet the criteria under paragraph (1), the Secretary shall include a recommendation relating to the project in the annual report submitted to Congress by the Secretary in accordance with .section 2282d of this title

children.heading: Requests for projects
children.label: d Requests for projects
children.text: The Secretary may carry out a project for a coastal state under this section only at the request of the Governor or chief executive officer of the coastal state, as appropriate.

children.heading: Definition
children.label: e Definition
children.text: In this section, the terms “coastal zone” and “coastal state” have the meanings given such terms in , as in effect on .section 1453 of title 16June 10, 2014
